title: Blockables - Chairs
description: The second mod in the Tools and Blockables series: Chairs
body:
Adding Chairs to minecraft

### This mod is very lagy some times

### Disclaimer
the placement of the chairs is very weird and you will probly place them sideways MAKE SURE there is a block next to the block you want to place the chair on so it is the right way up

### Chairs:
- adjustable stool
- bar stool
- bench
- iron bench
- bench with back
- iron bench with back
- chair
- baby chair
- dining chair
- couch
- box couch
- bench couch
- wooden couch
- fancy chair
- design chair
- cushioned chair
- folding stool
- metal chair
- foot stool
- wooden office chair
- office chair
- uprignt chair
- mesh chair
- metal stool 
- gaming chair 
- fancy office chair
- stool
- webbed stool

if you are a coder and want to help with this proget chat with me on discord: its Westmoon05

This mod is a part of the Tools and Blockables mod series :)

Join the Discord [https://discord.gg/a8XvUAMsB9](https://discord.gg/a8XvUAMsB9)

We recomend Create [https://modrinth.com/mod/create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

Modles By [https://sketchfab.com/wackyblocks](https://sketchfab.com/wackyblocks)
